'''Inspector 11''' was an [[Analysis droid/Legends|Analysis droid]] on [[Mechis III/Legends|Mechis III]]. He oversaw the production of the [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]] line.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}
